name: responsive-modernize
description: [ALPHA — research-grade, 7 review rounds found 46+ bugs, rate not plateauing] multi-viewport responsive audit + automatic modernization. Scans CSS/HTML/JSX/Vue/Svelte/Astro/CSS-in-JS/SCSS/Vanilla Extract for responsive anti-patterns, runs Playwright multi-engine runtime checks, proposes ranked fixes, applies safe atomic codemods (Utopia fluid type/space, safe-area-inset, Tailwind className edits, fixed-width overflow, image aspect-ratio, ...), verifies via pixelmatch + re-diagnose, escalates residuals to LLM agent via claude CLI subprocess.
author: Samo Music (beemusicco)

scripts.test: node test/run-fixtures.mjs && node test/smoke.mjs && node test/unit-colormath.mjs
